land.feature1_desc: Practice real-time conversations with AI tutors to build speaking confidence and natural flow.
land.feature2_desc: Learn Korean vocabulary the fun way by filling in lyrics to your favorite K-Pop rhythms.
land.feature3_desc: Perfect your pronunciation with phoneme-level assessments that catch even the smallest errors.
land.feature4_desc: Become the protagonist in dozens of real-world scenarios, from ordering coffee to business meetings.
land.feature5_desc: Watch educational VODs with dual subtitles and an integrated real-time click dictionary.
land.feature6_desc: Chat with AI friends and receive real-time grammar corrections and natural expression tips.
land.feature7_desc: Master essential phrases and Korean culture through curated daily cards and insights.
land.feature8_desc: Generate personalized learning materials tailored specifically to your interests and level.
land.feature9_desc: Receive detailed weekly reports analyzing your study time, accuracy, and fluency progress.
land.features_subtitle: Experience the most powerful AI-driven Korean learning tools.
land.hero_subtitle:
The most advanced Korean pronunciation correction solution with AI Onui.
Start the experience where your voice meets data.
landing.cta.desc: Don't struggle alone anymore. AI coach Onui will help you master Korean.
landing.cta.label: Start Now
landing.cta.title: Time to transform your Korean
landing.engine.desc1: Our pronunciation evaluation system is used in speech education and therapy, assessing the accuracy of specific words or sentences.
landing.engine.desc2: By assigning scores to each consonant and vowel, we provide precise diagnostics on which pronunciations you struggle with and which you've mastered.
landing.engine.title: 🚀 AI Language Education Engine
landing.features.card1.desc: More than just good or bad. It analyzes and corrects tongue position, mouth shape, and accent in 0.1 seconds.
landing.features.card1.title: Ultra-Precise Pronunciation Correction (SpeechPro)
landing.features.card2.desc: Based on over 19,000 words of data, we precisely diagnose your current level (A1~C2) and provide a custom vocabulary list.
landing.features.card2.title: Big Data Vocabulary Diagnosis
landing.features.card3.desc: Beyond basic grammar correction, we coach you on natural Korean expressions and nuances appropriate for the context.
landing.features.card3.title: AI 1:1 Writing Feedback
landing.features.card4.desc: Listen to TTS audio with various speeds and intonations, transcribe, and perfectly grasp easily missed particles and endings.
landing.features.card4.title: Practical Listening Comprehension Training
landing.features.card5.desc: From diaries to essays, develop logical thinking and advanced vocabulary usage through theme-based writing practice.
landing.features.card5.title: Logical Writing Coach
landing.features.desc: From pronunciation to practical conversation and writing. AI thoroughly supports your entire language learning journey.
landing.features.label: Key Features
landing.features.lms.desc: Based on these AI engine technologies, we offer diverse language education services, including AI digital textbook platform development and AI LMS platform construction.
landing.features.lms.title: AI Digital Textbook & LMS
landing.features.title: Onui's Unique Learning System
landing.hero.card.label: AI Coach

landing.hero.chat.ai2: Great! Today we'll proceed with mouth shape/pronunciation → 5 short dialogues → feedback. Are you ready?
landing.hero.chat.user: I want to quickly improve both pronunciation and conversation. I can do 20 minutes a day.
landing.hero.desc: Effectively learn Korean pronunciation and vocabulary with AI pronunciation analysis, leveled learning, and interactive games.
landing.hero.title: Master Pronunciation, Conversation, and Writing all at once with AI Coach Onui.

landing.showcase.card2.desc: Provide consistent learning motivation through daily/monthly learning volume and score fluctuation trends.

landing.steps.desc: Just follow our scientifically designed curriculum.
landing.steps.step1.desc: Master the unique rhythm and intonation of Korean through phoneme-level pronunciation practice and shadowing.
landing.steps.step1.label: STEP 1: Master the Basics
landing.steps.step1.title: Achieve Native Pronunciation
landing.steps.step2.desc: Utilize vocabulary and sentences without boredom through various games like quizzes, puzzles, and dictation.
landing.steps.step2.label: STEP 2: Practical Application
landing.steps.step2.title: Immersive Gamification
landing.steps.step3.desc: Gain a deep understanding of Korean culture and emotions beyond language through folk tales and idiomatic expressions.

landing.steps.title: Most Efficient 3-Step Learning Method

landing.usp.result.desc: Our AI 1:1 intensive coaching, which understands even rhythm and breathing, guarantees quantitative results.

speechpro.err_mic:
Audio not sent correctly. Please record again.
(Check your microphone connection)
speechpro.err_no_result:
Audio not recognized or no analysis results.
Please speak louder and clearer, closer to the microphone.
speechpro.err_timeout:
Server response is slow. Please try again in a moment.
(Check your network connection, or try shorter sentences if the current one is too long)
speechpro.feedback_fair: Needs more practice. Keep up the effort! 📚
speechpro.feedback_good: Good pronunciation. A little more practice will make it even better! 💪
speechpro.feedback_poor: Needs a lot of practice. Try mimicking slowly! 🎯
